qa_pairs.question: Which program generated the core file?
At what line in program.cpp did the segmentation fault occur?
qa_pairs.answer: The segmentation fault occurred at program.cpp:15.

qa_pairs.question: What specific line of code is identified as the cause of the segmentation fault?
qa_pairs.answer: The line of code identified is `cout << numbers[1000000] << endl;`.

qa_pairs.question: What is recommended if separate debugging information is missing?
qa_pairs.answer: If separate debugging information is missing, it is recommended to use `debuginfo-install glibc-2.16-31.fc18.x86_64 libgcc-4.7.2-8.fc18.x86_64 libstdc++-4.7.2-8.fc18.x86_64`.
